nav_logout_confirm.title: Sign out
nav_logout_confirm.message: You will need to log in again to access the app.

rail_overview.title: Side menu
rail_overview.content: This is the main menu. Each icon leads to a section of the platform.

rail_workflows.title: Workflows
rail_workflows.content: Create and manage your automation flows with AI agents.

rail_agents.title: Agents
rail_agents.content: Configure agent profiles that will be used in your workflows.

rail_events.title: Executions
rail_events.content: Track the execution history of your workflows in real time.

rail_rag.title: RAG Bases
rail_rag.content: Manage the knowledge bases that power your agents.

palette.title: Node palette
palette.content: Drag agent types from here to the canvas to build your workflow.

canvas.title: Canvas
canvas.content: Connect nodes by dragging edges between them to define the execution flow.

inspector.title: Inspector
inspector.content: Click on a node to configure its parameters in this right panel.

toolbar.title: Action bar
toolbar.content: Save and run your workflow here. Execution status appears in real time.
